stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 13, what is the definition of the term accident?

options.a: An occurrence associated with the operation of an aircraft which affects or could affect the safety of operation.
options.b: A person is fatally or seriously injured, or the aircraft sustains damage or structural failure, or the aircraft is missing or is completely inaccessible.
options.c: A person receives minor injuries, or the aircraft sustains minor damage.
options.d: A person is fatally or seriously injured, or the aircraft sustains minor damage or structural failure.
